response.overview: About one of the oldest and most distinctive summer festivals—Mėnuo Juodaragis—which was held for the last time a year ago. How did it all begin, what did it become, and what does it leave behind? In this documentary sketch, the festival’s original organizers share their memories, funny stories, and what they’ve created over the years. It’s a journey through time.
response.title: Mėnuo Juodaragis. Kelionė į aušrą
